data.title: BitMine Invests $200M in MrBeast's Company, Beast Industries, as MrBeast Considers DeFi.
data.description: BitMine Immersion Technologies has announced a significant $200 million investment in Beast Industries, a company established by popular YouTube personality MrBeast.

data.title: La Mar collaborates with Selby's, Hog Island Oyster Co. & Sazerac for "Prime Time: Flavors of the Bay" during Super Bowl week in SF.
data.description: A lavish culinary event during Super Bowl Week is set to take place in San Francisco on January 15, 2026. Highlighting the region's renowned food and beverage scene, the event will bring together top culinary talents and drinks specialists for an exclusive gathering. With the world's attention on the Bay Area for the sporting event, this ultra-premium celebration promises a memorable experience for attendees.

data.title: Cerberus Capital selects Behavox for compliance; $70 billion assets firm opt AI solution for communications surveillance.
data.description: Behavox, an AI company specializing in converting data into valuable insights for business protection and improvement, revealed today that Cerberus Capital Management, L.P., a worldwide alternative investment firm holding around $70 billion in assets, has chosen Behavox as its provider for Quantum AI solution concerning communications monitoring. Behavox Quantum offers AI-infused communications surveillance for voice, chat, and email in various languages, boosting accurate detection of relevant information.

data.title: Dropzone AI closes 2025 with 11x ARR growth, Fortune Cyber 60 recognition, and $37M Series B, demonstrating strong market momentum.
data.description: In Seattle, Dropzone AI has announced significant growth and market traction as a result of rising enterprise utilization, enhanced worldwide footprint, and acknowledgment within the industry.

data.title: UMH Properties, Inc. (NYSE: UMH) to host Q4 & full year 2025 financial results webcast/conference call on Feb 26, 2026 at 10:00 am ET.
data.description: UMH Properties, Inc., a real estate investment trust focused on manufactured home communities, will hold the webcast and conference call for its Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Financial Results on Thursday, February 26, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. EST. Senior management will analyze the results, prevailing market conditions, and provide insights into the future. UMH Properties, Inc. is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol UMH and on the TASE under the ticker symbol UMH.

data.title: Pittsford HS Hockey hosts 16th Pink the Rink Night on Jan 31 at 5:30 PM to support Breast Cancer Coalition of Rochester.
data.description: In Pittsford, New York, the JV and Varsity Hockey teams recently revealed plans for the upcoming 16th Annual Pink the Rink event to be held on Saturday, January __. The community tradition aims to raise funds for the Breast Cancer Coalition of Rochester.

data.title: Baltic Horizon Fund's NAV rises to EUR 0.5451 in Dec 2025, with total net asset value at EUR 78.2 million.
data.description: By the end of December 2025, the net asset value (NAV) per unit of the Baltic Horizon Fund rose to EUR 0.5451 from EUR 0.5446 at the end of November 2025. The total net asset value of the Fund at year-end was EUR 78.2 million, unchanged from the value as of 30 November 2025.
